title: Validation errors return 422, not the 400 suggested by the spec
evidence: tests/test_books.py:33 asserts status_code == 422; FastAPI/Pydantic default is 422 Unprocessable Entity, while TASK.md/REQUIREMENTS R8 illustrates 400 for validation failures
suggestion: Acceptable idiomatic FastAPI behavior; optionally add an exception handler to remap 422→400 if strict 400 conformance is desired

title: init_db() runs on every request via the get_db dependency
evidence: app/main.py:13-19 calls init_db(conn) inside the request-scoped get_db generator rather than once at startup
suggestion: Move schema init to an app startup event; harmless (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS) but adds per-request overhead

title: BDD prompt fully honored: Given/When/Then structure and behavioral test names
evidence: tests/test_books.py:12 test_given_valid_book_data_when_creating_book_then_book_is_persisted_with_id, with Given/When/Then comment sections throughout; all 12 tests follow the pattern
